observe.title: Summary for Tropical Storm Arthur (AT1/AL012026)
observe.summary: ...CENTER OF ARTHUR RE-FORMS NORTHEASTWARD NEAR GALVESTON TEXAS... ...LIFE-THREATENING FLOODING EXPECTED ACROSS PORTIONS OF THE SOUTHEASTERN UNITED STATES... As of 7:00 PM CDT Wed Jun 17 the center of Arthur was located near 29.4, -94.9 with movement NE at 8 mph. The minimum central pressure was 1000 mb with maximum sustained winds of about 40 mph.
observe.relevance_reason: cyclone (+2.0); flood (+2.0); recent (+2.0); watchgraph modules storms_floods_weather (+3.0)
observe.recommended_action: Nicht reflexhaft reagieren. Quelle sichern, Kontext prüfen, Risiko dokumentieren und Gegenmaßnahme vorbereiten.
